MARMOT features single-qubit error rates of (3,7 +/- 0,8)E-4 and average coupling to next-neighbor qubits of 0.6%. These error rates are compatible with fault-tolerant requirements. [More](https://www.aqt.eu/solution/pine-system-19-rack-mounted-quantum-computer/)

occurrence_sentence: The trap is located inside an ultra-high vacuum chamber facilitating a low background-gas collision rate of < 0.02 1/s. Easy optical interface for qubit manipulation, cooling and detection is provided via fiber ports. Single-qubit operations on a fault-tolerant level as well as fast detection can be implemented via the provided high-NA objective.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: The research promotion agency FFG and the University of Innsbruck are investing a total of ten million Euros in the start-up company AQT.
Together, the University of Innsbruck and AQT have successfully integrated a quantum computer into a high-performance computing (HPC) environment for the first time in Austria.
